title: Mandala's GUI - Dark mode for Trinkets
description:
This is an UNOFFICIAL version of 
"Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" for "Trinkets"
body:
# About:
A resourcepack with the _GUI style_ of "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" by [CesarZorak](https://modrinth.com/user/CesarZorak) for the mod [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
# Versions:
* Compatible with 1.19.x - 26.x
